data.title: /C O R R E C T I O N -- 7-Eleven, Inc./
data.description: 7-Eleven, Inc. has launched a new line of hot sandwiches nationwide to satisfy big cravings, as announced in the press release dated July 2, 2026. The company has revised the sub-headline and some portions of the original text. Customers can now enjoy a variety of these hot sandwiches available at all 7-Eleven locations across the country. This initiative aims to cater to the increasing demand for on-the-go convenient food options. The new menu has been well-received, with an impressive increase in sales of around 15% since the launch. The company is excited to continue providing customers with tasty and convenient food choices.

Russia has sent a note to the Swedish Foreign Ministry in connection with another UAV attack on the Russian diplomatic mission in Sweden, the Russian ambassador said.

data.title: Will Oil Prices Keep Falling? WTI Futures Hit Pre-Iran War Lows
data.description: As crude oil prices continued their downward trend, they were on course for a fourth consecutive week of decline after a drop on Thursday morning. WTI futures reached their lowest points since before the U.S.-Iran conflict. This raises the question of whether oil prices will continue to decrease.

data.title: Stock Market Rebounds, But AI Falters; Meta, Tesla, Jobs Report In Focus: Weekly Review
data.description: Major stock market indexes experienced significant gains for the week; however, AI stocks faced challenges amidst the excitement surrounding Meta. Tesla saw a decline following a report of exceptional delivery numbers. The market rebounded overall, with a particular focus on Meta, Tesla, and the latest jobs report.

data.title: Evidation Insights from 165,000 People Show Continued Growth Potential Amid Uneven Adoption in the GLP-1 Market
data.description: Evidation, based in San Mateo, California, a prominent provider of real-world data in health research, unveiled fresh findings from various long-term surveys indicating a swift but uneven growth in the market for GLP-1s and prescription weight management. These insights reveal distinct trends across different demographic groups such as age, gender, and income levels. The data suggests a segmented market influenced by factors like access, affordability, awareness, and treatment options, potentially influencing the initiation of treatment.

data.title: Candidly Expands Its AI Financial Guidance Platform with Six New Capabilities, Including Guidance for Trump Accounts
data.description: In New York, a leading AI-native financial guidance platform, Candidly, unveiled six new features integrated into the Candidly Intelligence Center. This state-of-the-art infrastructure offers personalized financial advice tailored to each individual within the enterprise. The newly introduced capabilities cover various aspects including retirement planning, equity compensation, and account management. This upgrade enhances the company's ability to provide customized financial solutions to a wide range of end users.

data.title: EZEE FIBER EXECUTIVES EARN MULTIPLE MERIT AWARDS HONORS
data.description: In Houston, Texas, on July 2, 2026, Ezee Fiber, a rapidly-expanding fiber internet company dedicated to providing dependable high-speed broadband to communities, acknowledged two of its senior leaders for their contributions to customer experience and workplace excellence.

data.title: National Movement Launches a Citizens Constitutional Convention
data.description: The inaugural Citizens Constitutional Convention is being organized by Common Sense, with the aim of enabling regular Americans to suggest bipartisan constitutional reforms that have widespread support. This event is set to take place in Washington on July 2, 2026. Despite varying opinions on numerous topics, extensive polling consistently indicates that there is strong consensus among Americans.

data.title: 2027 SUBARU TRAILSEEKER EV STARTS AT $39,995 MSRP AS SUBARU MAINTAINS PRICING ACROSS EV LINEUP
data.description: The forthcoming 2027 Subaru Trailseeker is an all-electric vehicle showcasing 375 horsepower, capable of accelerating from 0 to 60 mph in just 4.3 seconds. It boasts generous seating and cargo space. The vehicle's range reaches up to 281 miles on one charge, and can be swiftly charged using the standard NACS charge port at speeds of up to 150 kW. Additionally, it features the standard Subaru Symmetrical All-Wheel Drive system.

data.title: Vero Fiber Networks Finalizes Acquisition of Velocity Fiber, Accelerating Growth in K-12 E-Rate Sector
data.description: On July 2, 2026, Vero Fiber Networks (Vero), a prominent fiber-optic infrastructure company, disclosed the completion of its acquisition of Velocity Fiber, a specialized fiber provider concentrating on the K-12 E-Rate market in four states. The acquisition marks a strategic move by Vero to expand its presence in the education sector and strengthen its market position. Founded with a focus on providing high-speed connectivity to schools, Velocity Fiber operates in multiple states, serving numerous educational institutions. This acquisition solidifies Vero's commitment to enhancing connectivity and broadband access in the education industry, highlighting the importance of reliable infrastructure for educational institutions.

data.title: On the Backdrop of America’s 250th Birthday Thousands of Advocates to Attend the We the People March for Freedom
data.description: On July 3, 2026, thousands of concerned Americans will gather in Fort Lauderdale, Florida for the We The People March for Freedom on America's 250th birthday. The event will begin at 6pm EST in downtown Fort Lauderdale's Esplanade Park. The rally will include speakers like activist Delores Huerta and will host a variety of national and local program participants.

data.title: ATS Names Eric Martin President
data.description: In Peoria, Illinois on July 2, 2026, Advanced Technology Services, Inc. (ATS), a prominent company offering technology-based industrial maintenance solutions, revealed Eric Martin as their new President. Martin will oversee ATS's Sales and Strategy initiatives, bringing his expertise to steer the company forward.
Reports: Israel Defense Minister Israel Katz says he was updated in an assessment today that the military has demolished 83% of the Hamas tunnels in the IDF-held portion of the Gaza Strip.

data.title: ONLY 250th ANNIVERSARY COMMEMORATIVE ITEM DELIVERING SLICE OF AMERICAN HISTORY NOW SHIPPING AND MAKING PUBLIC DEBUT JULY 4 AT NEW LANDMARK LADY LIBERTY EXHIBITION
data.description: A significant artifact marking the semiquincentennial anniversary provides an opportunity for Americans to claim ownership of a portion of the Statue of Liberty. This initiative aims to raise funds for nonprofit organizations dedicated to safeguarding and promoting American heritage. The event took place in Newport, Rhode Island on July 2, 2026. The artifact serves as a unique way to support these nonprofits while connecting individuals to a symbol of national pride.

data.title: PenFed Credit Union Successfully Completes Auto Loan Securitization
data.description: In an effort to enhance financial stability, PenFed Credit Union, based in TYSONS, Va., successfully utilized securitization to bolster its operations. This move aims to secure diversified funding sources, improve liquidity, and increase net worth for the credit union. On July 2, 2026, PenFed Credit Union, a prominent federal credit union, confirmed the completion of its fourth prime auto loan securitization. This strategic maneuver will fortify the credit union's position by leveraging this financial tool to strengthen its foundation.
